title: Actress Says She’s Found Her Secret Online Abuser: Her Husband
summary: Collien Fernandes said her spouse had posted deepfakes of her. The account, disputed by her husband, spurred outrage, protests and parliamentary debates in Germany.

title: Robert Trivers, Eccentric Scientist Who Probed Human Nature, Dies at 83
